mapper.update:
update sky_take_out.orders
status = #{status},
pay_status = #{payStatus},
delivery_status = #{deliveryStatus},
rejection_reason = #{rejectionReason}
estimated_delivery_time = #{estimatedDeliveryTime},
checkout_time = #{checkoutTime},
tableware_number = #{tablewareNumber},
tableware_status = #{tablewareStatus},
address = #{address},
delivery_fee = #{deliveryFee},
where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into orders(number, status, user_id, address_book_id, order_time, checkout_time, pay_method, pay_status, amount, remark, user_name, phone, address, consignee, cancel_reason, rejection_reason, cancel_time, estimated_delivery_time, delivery_status, delivery_time, pack_amount, tableware_number, tableware_status, shop_id, delivery_fee) values(#{number}, #{status}, #{userId}, #{addressBookId}, #{orderTime}, #{checkoutTime}, #{payMethod}, #{payStatus}, #{amount}, #{remark}, #{userName}, #{phone}, #{address}, #{consignee}, #{cancelReason}, #{rejectionReason}, #{cancelTime}, #{estimatedDeliveryTime}, #{deliveryStatus}, #{deliveryTime}, #{packAmount}, #{tablewareNumber}, #{tablewareStatus}, #{shopId}, #{deliveryFee})
